title: CodexTaskResult
description: Structured result for a delegated Codex task, so the caller can parse the outcome reliably instead of scraping prose. NOTE: OpenAI structured-output strict mode requires every property to appear in `required`; express optionality with nullable types (e.g. ["boolean", "null"]) rather than omitting the key.

summary.description: One short paragraph: what was done and why.

filesChanged.description: Repo-relative paths created or modified (empty array if none).

testsPassed.description: true/false if tests ran; null if not run.

status.description: done = task complete and verified; partial = some work left; blocked = could not proceed.

notes.description: Anything the reviewer should know: caveats, follow-ups, assumptions (null if none).
